triggerCondition: User reported white screen after terminal implementation

failurePattern.rootCause: TypeScript compilation errors preventing React app from loading

context.claudeSolution: Import TerminalFixed component and modify Terminal imports

specificErrors.error: TS2353: 'cacheTime' does not exist in type QueryObserverOptions
TS2322: JSX property 'jsx' does not exist on style element
specificErrors.impact: Invalid JSX syntax causing render failure

specificErrors.error: TS2322: Property 'ref' does not exist on TerminalProps

neuralTrainingData.input: Terminal component implementation with import modifications
neuralTrainingData.expectedOutput: Working terminal with no TypeScript errors
neuralTrainingData.actualOutput: White screen due to build failures
neuralTrainingData.learningPattern: Always validate TypeScript compilation before deployment
